title: Earth Apple Fold
description: An earthy and velvety weeknight Jamaican dish featuring a fruit mix folded with gluten-free-friendly elements.

ingredients.name: 1 cup almond milk (or any non-dairy milk)

instructions: Combine the chopped apples, mashed bananas, cocoa powder, honey or agave nectar, and salt in a mixing bowl.
Add the almond milk gradually while stirring continuously to form a smooth consistency.
Divide the mixture into 2 bowls for folding. Ensure each bowl has enough batter (about 1/4 cup per fold).
Fold one apple-banana-cocoa-almond-milk mix over another in alternating layers, creating patterns or designs as desired.
Place folded apples on a baking sheet and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes until golden brown.
Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla yogurt or a drizzle of maple syrup.
